title: Air Canada Express plane collides with fire truck at New York's LaGuardia Airport
summary_full: An Air Canada Express CRJ-900 plane collided with a fire truck on Runway 4 while landing at New York's LaGuardia Airport. The incident, reported by FlightRadar24, led the FAA to halt all flights at the airport. Several injuries are feared, with more details pending.
